memoryArtifacts.headline: Fraunceys, Sir Hugh  story 1395-1427
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Hugh Fraunceys was born in 1395 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, the son of Isabelle and Robert. He married Philippa Hemmys in 1420 in his hometown. They had four children during their marriage. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Fraunceys於1395年出生在英國素福爾可哈斯特時，他的父親Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire36歲，母親Isabel Bernehaud31歲。他於大約1420年與Philippa Hamme在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年32歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Fraunceys was born in 1395, in Hartest, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire, was 36 and his mother, Isabel Bernehaud, was 31. He married Philippa Hamme about 1420, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1427, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Fraunceys est né en 1395, à Hartest, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Bernehaud, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Hamme environ 1420, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1427, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Fraunceys 1395 in Hartest, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire 36 und seine Mutter Isabel Bernehaud 31. Er hat um 1420 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Philippa Hamme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1427 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England und wurde in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Fraunceys è nato il nel 1395 nel Hartest, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Bernehaud, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Hamme circa 1420, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Fraunceysが1395年にイギリススフォルクハーテストで生まれた時，父Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshireは36歳，母Isabel Bernehaudは31歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでPhilippa Hammeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1427年にイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで32歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Fraunceys(이)가 1395년 영국 수폴크 하츠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Bernehaud(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Philippa Hamme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Fraunceys nasceu em 1395, em Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Bernehaud, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Hamme aproximadamente 1420, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1427, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Fraunceys родился в 1395 г. в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Bernehaud, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Hamme около 1420 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1427 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Philippa Hamme aproximadamente 1420, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1427, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
